case_title: ONESIMO MONTEJO ALVARO VS. LUIS BRAVO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVARO, ONESIMO MONTEJO AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, LUIS AS AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVARO, ONESIMO MONTEJO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAVO, LUIS AS AN INDIVIDUAL $2,520.99 PRINCIPAL, $8.77 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,686.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
